org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.

Provides the API for chat client advisors.

    BaseAdvisorChain.Builder<B extends BaseAdvisorChain.Builder<B>>

    Methods in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api that return BaseAdvisorChain.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static BaseAdvisorChain.Builder<?>
    BaseAdvisorChain.builder(io.micrometer.observation.ObservationRegistry observationRegistry)
    Creates a new BaseAdvisorChain.Builder for the default BaseAdvisorChain implementation.
    default BaseAdvisorChain.Builder<?>
    BaseAdvisorChain.mutate()
    Returns a new BaseAdvisorChain.Builder initialized with this chain's advisors and configuration, allowing it to be selectively modified before building a new chain.
